title: Western Blot (semi-dry)
author: Anna Behle
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8fdhti6

steps.title: Equilibrate gel in Cathode buffer for 30 minutes (no shaking)
steps.instruction: Equilibrate gel in Cathode buffer for 30 minutes (no shaking)

steps.title: Activate PCDF-Membrane for ca
steps.instruction: Activate PCDF-Membrane for ca. 20 seconds in MeOH, incubate for 2 minutes in dH2O (no shaking)

steps.title: Equilibrate PCDF-Membrane for 5 minutes in Anode buffer
steps.instruction: Equilibrate PCDF-Membrane for 5 minutes in Anode buffer

steps.title: Wet two Blotting papers (thickness 1...
steps.instruction: Wet two Blotting papers (thickness 1 mm each) in Anode buffer and place on Anode

steps.title: Put PCDF-membrane on top
steps.instruction: Put PCDF-membrane on top

steps.title: Put Gel on top
steps.instruction: Put Gel on top

steps.title: Wet two blotting papers (thickness 1...
steps.instruction: Wet two blotting papers (thickness 1 mm each) in Cathode buffer and place on gel.

steps.title: Cut membranes and papers as exactly...
steps.instruction: Cut membranes and papers as exactly as possible to gel size (Careful! Gel gains some size while equilibrating) and place each component exactly on top of eachother. After each step consider eliminating air bubbles by rolling them out with a glass rod with buffer.

steps.title: Run blot at 1,5 mA/cm2 for...
steps.instruction: Run blot at 1,5 mA/cm2 for 90 minutes (depending on the size of the protein, the blotting duration will have to be adjusted)

steps.title: Block membrane with TBST + 5%...
steps.instruction: Block membrane with TBST + 5% milk powder for 45 minutes

steps.title: Wash membrane with TBST and primary...
steps.instruction: Wash membrane with TBST and primary antibody for at least 1h at RT or 4°C over night. Anti-gfp antibody will be diluted 1:5000 in TBST, use as little volume as possible to preserve the expensive antibody.

steps.title: Wash for 10 minutes in TBST
steps.instruction: Wash for 10 minutes in TBST. Repeat 3 times.

steps.title: Add secondary antibody and incubate at...
steps.instruction: Add secondary antibody and incubate at least 45 minutes at RT or at 4°C over night. Swivel gently.

steps.title: Wash for 10 minutes in TBST
steps.instruction: Wash for 10 minutes in TBST. Repeat 3 times.

steps.title: Mix Bio-Rad Clarity Western 1:1 (ca
steps.instruction: Mix Bio-Rad Clarity Western 1:1 (ca. 1 ml per membrane). Let membrane drain, evenly add developer to membrane (with 1ml tip). Spread between film (remove bubbles), incubate for 1 minutes and detect.

steps.title: Blots; Chemi or Chemi-high Sensitivity, Signal...
steps.instruction: Blots; Chemi or Chemi-high Sensitivity, Signal Accumulation mode, transmission light for ladder detection

steps.title: Don't forget to take a picture of membrane for merge
steps.instruction: Don't forget to take a picture of membrane for merge!

steps.title: Wash blot in TBS
steps.instruction: Wash blot in TBS

steps.title: immerse in stripping buffer
steps.instruction: immerse in stripping buffer

steps.title: incubate at RT for 5-15 minutes (Under the hood
steps.instruction: incubate at RT for 5-15 minutes (Under the hood!)

steps.title: remove and wash again in TBS
steps.instruction: remove and wash again in TBS

steps.title: reprobe
steps.instruction: reprobe!
